description_long: This is a modern front-loading washing machine with a rectangular, boxy form and a clean, minimalist design. The exterior is primarily white with a blue accent at the base, and the front features a circular glass door with a metallic rim, which is currently open. The control panel is located at the top front and includes several rotary dials, buttons, and a digital display, all clearly labeled for user interaction. The side panels are plain and unadorned, while the back is not visible in these views. The washing machine appears to be constructed mainly from metal and plastic, with a transparent section in the door for viewing the drum. The overall build suggests durability and functionality, suitable for placement in urban environments such as laundromats, apartment buildings, or garages.
description: A white, front-loading washing machine with a circular glass door, blue base accent, and a detailed control panel on the top front.
description_view_0: Side view showing the plain left panel and the open circular door extending outward.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the open circular door, blue base, and the full control panel with dials and buttons.
description_view_2: Side view from the right, similar to view 0, with the open door visible from a different angle.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a featureless, flat back panel with no visible controls or openings.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel is located at the top front of the washing machine and features two rotary dials, several buttons, and a digital display, all arranged horizontally with clear labeling.
attribute_door_type: Front-loading, circular porthole door with a glass center and metallic rim, featuring a visible handle for opening and closing.
attribute_detergent_drawer_location: The detergent drawer is visible on the top left of the front panel, integrated into the control panel area, and appears as a rectangular pull-out compartment.
attribute_drum_visibility: partially; the drum is visible through the open door, showing the inner metallic surface and drum opening.
